question:
A safe haven is ______.
1) an approved place for parking unattended vehicles loaded with radioactive materials
2) an approved place for parking attended vehicles loaded with flammables
3) an unapproved place for parking unattended vehicles loaded with explosives
4) an approved place for parking unattended vehicles loaded with explosives
canonical_answer: an approved place for parking unattended vehicles loaded with explosives

appears_in.title: Hazmat Endorsement Nj
appears_in.answer: an approved place for parking unattended vehicles loaded with explosives

appears_in.title: Hazmat Practice Test Nj
appears_in.answer: an approved place for parking unattended vehicles loaded with explosives
